# internal-artifact-mapping.txt
# Mapping of internal/vendor JARs for CI installation via install-internal-deps.sh
#
# Format (space-separated):
#   groupId  artifactId  version  libs/jarfile.jar
#
# Lines starting with '#' are comments and are ignored by the install script.
#
# How it works:
#   - For each active (uncommented) entry the script tries to install the
#     specified JAR into the local Maven repository.
#   - If the JAR file is missing the script creates a TEMPORARY dummy JAR and
#     installs that instead, so that the Maven build can continue in CI.
#   - Dummy JARs MUST be replaced with real artifacts before production use.
#   - See CONTRIBUTING.md for guidance on replacing dummy JARs.

# --- Artifacts present in libs/ ---
com.projectgoth  common-lib    0.0.3   libs/common-lib-0.0.3.jar
com.projectgoth  hashtag       0.0.2   libs/hashtag-0.0.2.jar
com.projectgoth  leto-common   0.27.0  libs/leto-common-0.27.0.jar
com.projectgoth  s3uploader    0.0.1   libs/s3uploader-0.0.1.jar
com.zeroc.linux  Ice           3.3.1   libs/Ice.jar
jpcap            jpcap         0.7     libs/jpcap-0.7.jar
mibli            mibli         1.0     libs/mibli-1.0.jar

# --- Missing artifacts (real JARs not yet available in this repository) ---
# When the real JAR is obtained, add it to libs/, uncomment the line below,
# and remove the corresponding dummy from any CI cache.
#
# com.projectgoth  configuration         1.0.5  libs/configuration-1.0.5.jar
# com.mig33        mig33rabbitmq-client  0.5.0  libs/mig33rabbitmq-client-0.5.0.jar
